diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 5d6d82c..0a09bb3 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -389,2 +389,7 @@ Day 406 / Week 58 observations:
 - Usage is close to tier-3 capacity and should continue falling, so tier 3 is now worth trying with tighter quotas.
 - Week 58 adjustment: reduce quotas to A=2.5k/B=10k/C=25k and move capacity to tier 3. Keep C tier 4, no credits, $5k/day ops, and no dev/ad spend.
+
+Day 413 / Week 59 observations:
+- Cash is $1.76M. Subscribers fell to 8,649 and usage fell to 12.7M/week with no overload on tier 3.
+- Remaining base is effectively all S2 C (8,648 C seats and 1 B). Acquisition is gone, so the objective is preserving cash while harvesting the remaining monthly billings.
+- Week 59 adjustment: lower C from model tier 4 to tier 3 to halve C compute cost while S2 C delivered quality remains very high. Tighten C quota to 15k, keep capacity tier 3, $5k/day ops, no dev/ad spend, and no promotions.
